businessModel.text: Revenue from Pharmaceutical (Keytruda, Januvia, Gardasil, ~80%), Animal Health (Vifor integrated, ~12%), and Healthcare Services (Walgreens partnership, ~8%). High-margin proprietary drug portfolio.

recentCatalysts.text:
Keytruda: global sales $25bn+ FY24; label expansions ongoing in adjuvant melanoma, bladder, gastric
    Caplanex acquisition (ADC platform, 2024) adds 3 oncology assets in Phase II
    Vifor Pharma integration (acquired 2023) — renal/vascular franchise now contributing $1.8bn
    Winrevair (sotatercept) approved 2024 for pulmonary arterial hypertension — c.$3bn peak potential
items: Keytruda: global sales $25bn+ FY24; label expansions ongoing in adjuvant melanoma, bladder, gastric
Caplanex acquisition (ADC platform, 2024) adds 3 oncology assets in Phase II
Vifor Pharma integration (acquired 2023) — renal/vascular franchise now contributing $1.8bn
Winrevair (sotatercept) approved 2024 for pulmonary arterial hypertension — c.$3bn peak potential

risks.risk: 1. Keytruda composition-of-matter patent expires 2028 — biosimilar erosion begins immediately
2. US IRA (Inflation Reduction Act) price negotiation reduces revenue on selected drugs in 2026-28
3. Clinical setback risk on pembrolizumab combination trials in 1L lung cancer
4. Vifor integration slower than planned — $700M synergies not yet realised
5. Vaccine franchise (Gardasil) faces pricing pressure in US and European Gavi markets

entryExit.text:
Merck & Co (MRK) — Entry / Exit Framework

HOLD zone: $111.71–$123.85 — current levels are fairly valued.
Trim / Take Profits above $123.85 — approaching the 52-week high at $125.14.
Stop-loss: A sustained close below $71.84 (52-week low) would warrant reassessment.

sources.marketData: Live quote data sourced via DYOR HQ data pipeline (Google Sheets + Yahoo Finance). Fields include price, market capitalisation, 52-week range, P/E, EPS, and volume.
sources.companyFilings: Public company filings, regulatory announcements, investor presentations, and RNS where referenced in the analysis.
